title: Wire mod host collect/generate/analyze/rewrite through ContractInvoker
body:
Mod host routes `collect`, `generate`, `analyze`, and `rewrite` through **ContractInvoker** so Beskid mods use SDK contracts uniformly.

## Platform specification

- **Mod host bridge** — `/platform-spec/compiler/mods/mod-host-bridge` — *implements* (required)

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `compiler`
- **Commit:** [`a91d258`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid_compiler/commit/a91d258)
- **Subject:** feat(mod_host): wire mod.collect/generate/analyze/rewrite through ContractInvoker
- **Completed:** 2026-05-23

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.3 (Macros, concurrency, and stabilization)
- **Workstream:** `compiler-mods`
- **Domain:** `compiler`
- **Deliverable:** `v03-merge-wave`

## Relation
Contributes to deliverable **v0.3 macro/runtime/ffi/tooling delivery** (`v03-merge-wave`). Normative spec: **Mod host bridge** (*implements*).
